title: はろはろ！出会いは突然に、なの

text_block_list.name: Bandaged Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
None of this would've happened if you hadn't put me up to that
insane training!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I did it for you—your dream! I thought there was no other way to win
the Classic Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after becoming a trainer, I come across a heated exchange
between a trainer and a runner carrying a large bag.

text_block_list.name: Bandaged Umamusume
text_block_list.text: If I had known it would end like this... I wish I had never met you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that moment, a sobering realization hits me like a ton of bricks—an
Umamusume can only soar as high as her trainer can take her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she leaves the academy gates behind, I catch another glimpse of
her tear-streaked face—an image that continues to haunt me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Welcome! What can I get you for today?

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text: Two regular ramen.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Okay! Two regulars, on the double!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later, I find myself at a ramen joint with a fellow trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I heard you're really dragging your feet finding a trainee. What's up?
Getting cold feet or something?
choice_data_list:
It's just... we hold their lives in our hands, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I feel ya. Students come here to stake everything on winning big in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: So trainers have it rough too, huh...

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Well, just keep your chin up. You shouldn't turn tail and run before
giving it a proper shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
He's right. Starting tomorrow, I'll buckle down and focus on recruiting
a trainee. With renewed determination, I begin walking towards the
train station...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wait, waaaaait! You forgot something!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The waitress from earlier runs up to me, handing me a familiar-looking
phone.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Pheeew, glad I caught up... Geez, don't you know how dangerous it is
to leave your phone lying around like that?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're lucky some weirdo didn't pick it up! Be careful next time, 'kay?
See ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can thank her properly, she's already hurried off. I hastily
turn to chase after her, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bonk!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I crash headfirst into the pole behind me, bouncing down flat on my
back.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wh-what was that sound just now?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wait, you walked... right into that pole?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Are you... Heh, hehe... Geez, first the phone and now this—you're like
a walking disaster! Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After giggling for a bit, Ines Fujin holds out her right hand.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Phew... Anyway, can you stand?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gently pulls me back on my feet. A few days later, I find her again
in an unexpected place.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin is leading the pack in a small scrimmage. As the pack
rounds the final corner, the trailing runners kick into high gear.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment she's overtaken, the happy-go-lucky girl I remember
vanishes—her eyes widen and a beastly grin spreads from ear to ear.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "The lead is mine!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her mad dash is so powerful, it's almost like I can hear her shouting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's the one. I want to be her trainer. I want to help her soar.
However, as I step forward to approach her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hesitation washes over me, and the gut-wrenching words from that day begin ringing in my ears.

text_block_list.name: Bandaged Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I wish I had never met you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My mind races, freezing me in place. By the time I return to my
senses, Ines Fujin is nowhere to be seen.
